title: Grilled Kabanos and Sausage Skewers with Thai Peanut Sauce
description: Impress your dinner guests with these flavorful and visually appealing skewers, made with succulent kabanos and sausage, served with a creamy Thai peanut sauce.
instructions: Thread kabanos and sausage onto skewers, leaving space between each piece.
In a blender or food processor, combine peanuts, soy sauce, fish sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and brown sugar. Blend until smooth.
Brush the peanut sauce onto both sides of the skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the sausage is cooked through.
Serve the skewers with additional peanut sauce for dipping.
